name: Zuretinol acetate
description: Zuretinol acetate has been used in trials studying the treatment of Impaired Dark Adaptation, RP (Retinitis Pigmentosa), Retinitis Pigmentosa (RP), and LCA (Leber Congenital Amaurosis).

interactions.name: Trastuzumab
interactions.description: Trastuzumab may increase the cardiotoxic activities of Zuretinol acetate.

interactions.name: Paclitaxel
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Paclitaxel is combined with Zuretinol acetate.

interactions.name: Docetaxel
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Docetaxel is combined with Zuretinol acetate.

interactions.name: Cabazitaxel
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Cabazitaxel is combined with Zuretinol acetate.

interactions.name: Digoxin
interactions.description: Digoxin may decrease the cardiotoxic activities of Zuretinol acetate.
